Container.Name: VapeMixer
Container.Overview:
VapeMixer is a self-hosted DIY e-liquid calculator designed for mobile use as a PWA.
Features: - mixer for base, booster, and flavor calculations - recipe saving, loading, duplication, and export - stock tracking with low-stock warnings - mixing history with quick reload back into the calculator
Application data is stored in SQLite under /app/data, so the AppData path should be persisted.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: vape e-liquid diy calculator pwa recipes stock sqlite
Container.Requires: A writable AppData path is required for the SQLite database.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port used by the VapeMixer web interface.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent folder for the SQLite database and application data.
